title: Fisher's Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA) Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the conceptual steps and mathematical process of applying Fisher's LDA to project data onto a line that maximizes class separation.
elements: Solve Generalized Eigenvalue Problem (S_B * w = λ * S_W * w)
Project Data onto 1D Line (y = X * w*)
relationships: Input Data is used to calculate S_W and S_B
S_W and S_B are used to form the eigenvalue problem
The eigenvector corresponding to the largest eigenvalue becomes w*
w* is used to transform the multi-dimensional Input Data into the 1D Output
